name: Lemon Cats' Paws
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cup Plus 2 tablespoons All-purpose flour, divided
1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter, chilled and cut into
15 oz Swiss dark chocolate, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Make the cookie dough:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Process almonds with 1 cup flour in food processor until ground to a fine powder. Add remaining flour, sugar, and salt; process until thoroughly blended.
3. Add butter cubes, egg, vanilla, and lemon zest; process until creamy (ensure butter is fully blended).
4. Pipe the cookie dough onto baking sheets into "cats' paws" about 2 inches apart. Refrigerate for 10-15 minutes or until firm.
5. Bake cookies on each sheet for 12-15 minutes, turning halfway through. Cool on wire racks.
Assembly:
6. Melt dark chocolate and coat half of the cookies with a thin layer. Place second cookie halves together; refrigerate for 5-10 minutes.
7. Dip pointed tips of cookies into melted chocolate; refrigerate until set. Store in an airtight container up to two weeks (or three weeks if filled).
